_comment: Neutral-atom zoned architecture for the distance-3 surface-code XX-merge, following Qian Xu's layout (Xu et al. 2024 Nat.Phys. Fig.1; factoring taxonomy memory+processor+factory+operation-ancilla N_A+reservoir). The storage array (SLM 0) has TRAP SITES across all four zones -- MEMORY (cols 0-5), OPERATION-ANCILLA (cols 10-15), FACTORY (cols 20-25), RESERVOIR (cols 30-33) -- separated by empty-trap gaps. MEMORY + ANCILLA hold atoms; FACTORY (|CCZ> magic) + RESERVOIR are idle/reserved trap sites (this merge is Clifford). The ENTANGLING/processor zone (SLMs 1-2) sits well above (big y-gap), where the Rydberg CZ (the merge) fires. Distances um, durations us.
name: surface3_qianxu_zoned_arch
